description: Back at the Lighthouse, Deke tries to deliver news to Fitz about General Hale's capture, but is instead attacked by 'The Doctor', Fitz's Framework alter-ego. This marks the beginning of Fitz's psychological fracture as The Doctor emerges, claiming to be 'the only doctor here.' The scene is tense and unsettling.

transcript.line: Fitz! There you are. They... They told me to tell you that they got her. General Hale. All right, well, wasn't really expecting confetti or anything, but maybe like a “Blimey!” or, like, some kind of acknowledgement. You need a hand? I'm pretty good with metalwork. I guess it runs in my DNA. All right, man, well, I'm no doctor, but that looks like the opposite of what you're suppose...
No. I'm the only doctor here.
